title: Ixora ridsdalei
taxonomy: Ixora ridsdalei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is part of the genus Ixora, which is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The Ixora ridsdalei is further classified under the tribe Spermae and the subfamily Ixoroideae. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Ixora ridsdalei is related to other plants such as coffee and gardenia. The classification of Ixora ridsdalei is essential for its identification and conservation.
